---
title: "Concomitant Medications Listing"
subtitle: "Listing of Concomitant Medications by Subject"
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
---


```{r}
#| label: prereqs
#| include: false
library(arframe)
fr_theme(hlines = "header", font_family = "Courier New")

blank_to_na <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
    x
  })
  df
}
```

## Setup

See [Prerequisites](../install.qmd) for installation instructions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(arframe)
library(pharmaverseadam)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

arm_levels <- c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")

cm_listing <- pharmaverseadam::adcm |>
  blank_to_na() |>
  filter(
    ONTRTFL == "Y",
    TRT01A %in% arm_levels
  ) |>
  mutate(
    TRT01A  = factor(TRT01A, levels = arm_levels),
    ASTDT   = format(ASTDT, "%d %b %Y"),
    AENDT   = format(AENDT, "%d %b %Y"),
    ASTDT   = if_else(is.na(ASTDT), "", ASTDT),
    AENDT   = if_else(is.na(AENDT), "Ongoing", AENDT),
    CMDOSE_FULL = if_else(
      !is.na(CMDOSE) & CMDOSE != 0,
      paste0(CMDOSE, " ", if_else(is.na(CMDOSU), "", CMDOSU)),
      ""
    ),
    CMCLAS  = if_else(is.na(CMCLAS), "UNCODED", toupper(CMCLAS)),
    CMDECOD = if_else(is.na(CMDECOD), CMTRT, CMDECOD),
    CMROUTE = if_else(is.na(CMROUTE), "", CMROUTE)
  ) |>
  arrange(TRT01A, USUBJID, CMCLAS, CMDECOD) |>
  select(
    TRT01A,
    USUBJID,
    CMTRT,
    CMDECOD,
    CMCLAS,
    ASTDT,
    AENDT,
    CMDOSE_FULL,
    CMROUTE
  )
```


## arframe Pipeline

```{r}
#| label: pipeline
#| eval: false
cm_listing |>
  fr_table() |>
  fr_titles(
    "Listing 16.2.8.1",
    "Listing of Concomitant Medications by Subject",
    "Safety Population \u2014 On-Treatment Period"
  ) |>
  fr_cols(
    TRT01A      = fr_col(visible = FALSE),
    USUBJID     = fr_col("Subject ID",      width = 1.2),
    CMTRT       = fr_col("Medication",       width = 1.8),
    CMDECOD     = fr_col("Coded Name",       width = 1.6),
    CMCLAS      = fr_col("ATC Class",        width = 1.8),
    ASTDT       = fr_col("Start\nDate",      width = 1.1, align = "center"),
    AENDT       = fr_col("End\nDate",        width = 1.1, align = "center"),
    CMDOSE_FULL = fr_col("Dose",             width = 0.9, align = "center"),
    CMROUTE     = fr_col("Route",            width = 0.9, align = "center")
  ) |>
  fr_header(bold = TRUE, align = "center") |>
  fr_rows(page_by = "TRT01A", sort_by = c("USUBJID", "CMTRT"), suppress = "USUBJID") |>
  fr_footnotes(
    "On-treatment concomitant medications (ONTRTFL = 'Y').",
    "Coded name from CMDECOD (WHO Drug); ATC class from CMCLAS.",
    "Sorted by treatment arm, subject, ATC class, and coded medication name."
  )
```


## Rendered Listing

This is a subject-level listing of concomitant medications taken during the on-treatment period. Pages are broken by treatment arm using `page_by`.

```{r}
#| label: cm-listing
#| echo: false
#| ref.label: pipeline
```
